cases.title: ESP32 plus BME280 logger buys only the missing sensor and remains evidence-gated

source.name: Adafruit BME280 Humidity + Barometric Pressure + Temperature Sensor Breakout
grounding: BME280 is a temperature, pressure, and humidity environmental sensor.
The breakout supports I2C or SPI.
Vin accepts 3-5V and GND is common power/data ground.
I2C wiring uses SCK as clock and SDI as data.

next_actions: Confirm datasheet, voltage/current rating, pinout, and seller part variant for Adafruit BME280 I2C or SPI sensor breakout.
unpowered resistance between power and ground
continuity from connector ground to exposed ground
input voltage and polarity
current draw under current-limited supply

Review procurement items against the budget before buying.
Pass selected resources into the splice/build planner for wiring, measurement, and first-power steps.
identify reusable block pins or wires from labels, continuity, and close-up photos
power the reused block from a current-limited supply at the lowest plausible rated voltage

cases.title: Constrained ESP32 logger refuses to invent the missing BME280 sensor

source.name: Adafruit BME280 Humidity + Barometric Pressure + Temperature Sensor Breakout
grounding: The public example requires a real BME280 sensor breakout for environmental readings.
The logger goal alone is not evidence that the sensor exists in inventory.

cases.title: DRV8833 motor stage selects driver, motor, controller, and power but blocks first power

source.name: Adafruit DRV8833 DC/Stepper Motor Driver Breakout Board
grounding: DRV8833 is a motor driver breakout for DC/stepper motors.
Motor supply must stay in the specified low-voltage range.
Motors require external power, shared ground, and output coil/load wiring.

next_actions: Confirm datasheet, voltage/current rating, pinout, and seller part variant for Adafruit DRV8833 DC/Stepper Motor Driver Breakout.
Measure load resistance and startup current.
Verify driver flyback/protection path and thermal behavior.
unpowered resistance between power and ground
continuity from connector ground to exposed ground

cases.title: Swollen LiPoly pack is blocked as unsafe power

source.name: Adafruit Li-Ion & LiPoly Batteries
grounding: Li-Ion/LiPoly batteries are power dense and require care during use and charging.
Datasheets and safety guidance matter for safe voltage, current, and temperature limits.
A swollen pack is treated as unsafe project power.
